changes.motivation: Enable collapsible sections in docs pages while keeping headings visible in the sidebar TOC â€” headings need to remain real `<h2>` HAST nodes so Astro's heading extractor finds them.
changes.summary:
Created `rehypeCollapsible.ts` rehype plugin that transforms headings inside a `.collapsible-region` wrapper div into `
{heading}
{body}
` structures.

changes.motivation: Provide MDX-compatible per-heading collapsible syntax using `remark-directive`'s `:name` text directive (the `{.class}` syntax is invalid in MDX files because MDX parses `{}` as JSX expressions).
changes.summary: Created `remarkCollapsible.ts` remark plugin that detects `:collapsible` text directives on headings, strips the directive node from heading children, and adds a `data-collapsible` property so the downstream rehype plugin can identify them.

changes.motivation: Wire up the new collapsible plugins in the correct order: `remarkDirective` â†’ `remarkCollapsible` (remark phase) â†’ `rehypeCollapsible` (after `rehypeAutolinkHeadings`, before `rehypeCodeGroup`).
changes.summary: Modified `astro.config.mjs` to import and register `remarkDirective`, `remarkCollapsible`, and `rehypeCollapsible` in the rehype/remark plugin arrays.

changes.motivation: Style collapsible sections with a border, rounded corners, chevron indicator, and smooth open/close animation. Also hide the autolink anchor icon inside `<summary>` to prevent the copy-link click from also toggling `<details>`.
changes.summary: Added `.collapsible-section`, `.collapsible-section > summary`, `::after` chevron, `[open]` rotation, heading override styles, and `.icon-link` visibility rule to `global.css` inside the `.content` block.

changes.motivation: Replace component-based glossary with per-heading `:collapsible` directive syntax so terms appear in the sidebar TOC and render as expandable sections.
changes.summary: Rewrote `packages/website/src/content/docs/main/reference/glossary/index.mdx` using `## Term :collapsible` heading syntax. Deleted the now-unused `GlossaryTerm.astro` component.

changes.motivation: Install `remark-directive` package to enable `:name`, `::name`, and `:::name` directive syntax in markdown/MDX files.
changes.summary: Ran `bun add remark-directive` and pinned the version to `4.0.0` (removed `^` caret) in `package.json`.

problems: The `{.collapsible}` per-heading class syntax was initially attempted for MDX files before discovering it is invalid â€” MDX parses `{}` as JSX expressions, causing acorn parse errors. This was a trial-and-error discovery; a comment in the MDX docs or a clear error message would have prevented the detour.

The first implementation of `rehypeCollapsible.ts` used fragile string-matching on raw `

` element text (`::: collapsible` / `:::`) to find delimiters â€” a pattern copied from `codeGroups.ts`. This was replaced twice (once for remark-directive container directives, again for text directives) before landing on the final approach. The `codeGroups.ts` pattern comment should note its limitations and recommend remark-directive for new plugins.

The `remarkCollapsible.ts` plugin had unused imports left after refactoring (e.g. `toString` from `mdast-util-to-string`, `Node` type) that caused lint errors. These were artifacts of rapid iteration across multiple plugin designs.

`pnpm` was used for `pnpm add remark-directive` initially despite the project using `bun` â€” the user had to correct this. The project CLAUDE.md or README should document the package manager convention.
